name: Lazarus Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked chicken cubes with the diced dates.
2. Add the diced pineapple, drained, to the mixture.
3. Incorporate the diced celery into the dish.
4. Mix in the slivered almonds.
5. Stir together the Miracle Whip, sugar, canned milk, and lemon juice to form the dressing.
6. Pour the dressing over the chicken, dates, pineapple, celery, and almonds.
7. Enjoy!
